description: Edit an existing image (inpaint, background replacement, transparency, compositing, transform) via the GPT Image fallback CLI (image_gen.py edit).
rules: local-output only: writes an edited image + a request preview under record_store; never pushes to a remote
porter runs the CLI in --dry-run --no-augment so it validates the request and resolves output paths offline (no OPENAI_API_KEY, no network)
IMAGE (the input image to edit) is required; MASK (a PNG with alpha) is optional and scopes the edit region
a real (non-dry-run) edit requires OPENAI_API_KEY and the openai SDK; the porter degrades gracefully when they are absent
usage: Set PROMPT and IMAGE (input path), both required. Optional: MASK, MODEL, SIZE, INPUT_FIDELITY. Output: edit.json (request preview / audit).
limitation: The vendored porter only previews the request (--dry-run). Producing real pixels needs OPENAI_API_KEY + the openai SDK and is not performed by this governed porter.

vars.PROMPT: replace the background with a sunny beach
